title: BEM-972 exact assignment patch
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text()
old = "commit_sha = os.environ.get('COMMIT_SHA', '')"
new = "commit_sha = os.environ.get('COMMIT_SHA', '') or os.environ.get('GITHUB_SHA', '')"
found = old in text
if found:
    p.write_text(text.replace(old, new, 1))
    changed_files.append(str(p))
    ops_applied.append('bem972_exact_assignment_patch')
else:
    ops_applied.append('bem972_assignment_not_found')
diag = Path('governance/reports/BEM972_EXACT_ASSIGNMENT_PATCH_DIAG.txt')
diag.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
diag.write_text('found_assignment=' + str(found) + '\nold=' + old + '\nnew=' + new + '\n')
changed_files.append(str(diag))
"""
Create file governance/reports/BEM972_EXACT_ASSIGNMENT_PATCH.md with content BEM-972 | EXACT ASSIGNMENT PATCH | 2026-05-31 | 15:14 (UTC+3)

Этап: 22/23 (96%)
Дорожная карта BEM-931 foundation: 14/14 (100%); release gates: 0/4 (0%)

Чек-лист:
✅ Uses exact checkout snippet from BEM-971.
⚠️ If found_assignment=true and workflow appears in changed_files, BEM-973 verifies non-null SHA.
❌ No release PASS.

|---|---|---|
